title: Amtech L0532 17 Piece Precision Phone and Computer Repair Tool Set
features: VERSATILE: This precision phone and computer repair tool set includes a screwdriver handle, 2 x mini pry bars, 1 x pin, 1 x suction cup, 1 x triangular case opener and 11 x precision CR-V bits (Phillips, tri-wing, slotted, Torx and star)
STORAGE CASE: It is supplied in a handy plastic storage case for easy storage and transport
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 17pc PRECISION PHONE & COMPUTER REPAIR TOOL SET See more
